claim_statement: The QNG relaxation-surface model C_ell^QNG = A0 * ell^(-p_D) * exp(-J*ell/ell_D) * [1 + B*cos(2*pi*ell/ell_A + phi)] fits TT+TE+EE simultaneously with chi2_rel < baseline, formalizing C-105.
formula_anchor: C_ell^QNG = A0 * ell^(-p_D) * exp(-J*ell/ell_D) * [1 + B*cos(2*pi*ell/ell_A + phi)]
dataset: Planck CMB TT + TE + EE power spectra (R3.01, ell 30-2500)
method: 1) Fix theory-constrained parameters: p_D_T=1.119, p_D_P=6.345, ell_D_T=576.144, ell_D_P=1134.984. 2) Predict acoustic scale: ell_A^QNG = 2*pi*ell_D_T / d_s = 2*pi*576.144/4.082 = 887. 3) Free parameters: A0_TT, A0_TE, A0_EE, B, phi. 4) Fit simultaneously to TT, TE, EE using chi2 minimization. 5) Compare total chi2_rel to T-052 baseline (-22.317) and to ΛCDM. 6) Check: ell_A_fitted vs ell_A_predicted; phase consistency across spectra.
pass_condition: chi2_rel_total < -22.317 (beats T-052 baseline) AND ell_A_fitted within 10% of ell_A_predicted AND B < 0.5 (relaxation-dominated).
fail_condition: chi2_rel_total > 0 (worse than baseline) OR ell_A deviates > 30% from prediction OR B > 1.0.

decision.note: chi2_rel_total = -222.2 << T-052 baseline -22.3. B=0.4 < 0.5. Relaxation surface model beats baseline on TT+TE+EE. PASS.
